rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BEN C. KELLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Trailing Until After June 18, 2013 The Hearing On Francene Kelley Kennedy'S Petition For Probate And Letters Testamentary, Or In The Alternative, For Appointment As Special Administrator
rulings.Rulings: patter to be heard by Judge Wiss The Court treats the motion for reconsideration as a request to advance hearing on the Petition for Probate, grants the request, and advancees the hearing from 6/18/13 to 11/14/12; alternatively if the motion is treated as a motion for reconsideration, the Court grants reconsideration and upon reconsideration advances the hearing on the Petition for Probate from 6/18/13 to 11/14/12 at 9:00 a.m. Petitioner to provide notice to all necessary parties. Any party objecting to the tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on 10/23/12.
